response.overview: In order to remove the emotional masks we wear during the roles we play, as stepmother/career woman or student/stepdaughter, therapist Allie Haze instructs Angela Sommers and Elle Alexandra to figuratively step out of those roles by literally removing the clothing layers that reinforce those patterns of relating and behaving. Syren De Mer realizes that her stepdaughter took the wrong pills and will do anything to help her. When Whitney Wright opens the door, she pulls her in, throws her on the bed in the process and kisses her madly. With no fuck buddies to even consider at the moment, Ariana Marie suggests that she can take care of her mother sexual needs. Ariana has been experimenting with her best friend Gracie and apply her lesbian skills to please her lonely mother. After a lot of reconsideration, Ava Addams accepts her offer, but with one exception; Ariana fucks her with a Strap on dildo.
response.title: Let Me Help You
